## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests where practical
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `examples/config.yaml` / `CHANGELOG.md`) if behaviour changed
